news.t: AI Ranks Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Pure Value ETF Best Smart Beta ETF

holdings.infoBox: RFV is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arrow Electronics stock at 4.16%, Avnet at 3.95%, TD SYNNEX at 2.84%, PBF Energy at 2.44%, and Lear Corporation at 2.34%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Midcap 400 Pure Value ETF (RFV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Pure Value index. The fund tracks a fundamentally weighted index of US-listed value companies. RFV was launched on Mar 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: AI Ranks Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Pure Value ETF Best Smart Beta ETF
data.text: RZV scored Best for the week, according to Q.ai's AI systems. Our deep learning algorithms have crunched the numbers to bring you this month's top US Value Smart Beta ETFs — the best, the good, and th...

data.title: Best Value ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best value ETFs for Q2 2021 are RZV, RFV, and IVOV.
